news.headline: 1st Detect introduces new TRACER 1000 Narcotics Trace Detector to combat synthetic opiates and NPS. Speed and accuracy critical.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, on March 10, 2025, Astrotech Corporation unveiled the upgraded TRACER 1000™ Narcotics Trace Detector under its 1st Detect subsidiary. Known as TRACER 1000 NTD, this advanced mass spectrometer is tailored to detect synthetic opiates and novel psychoactive substances (NPS). The device guarantees precision and rapid screening capabilities to combat the worldwide drug epidemic. Astrotech Corporation operates on the Nasdaq stock exchange under the ticker symbol ASTC.

news.headline: Vishay Precision Group (NYSE: VPG) to present at Sidoti Small-Cap Conference on March 19, 2025 at 11:30 a.m. ET.
news.summary: Vishay Precision Group, Inc., a prominent player in precision measurement and sensing technologies trading on the NYSE under the symbol VPG, disclosed plans to participate in the Sidoti March 2025 Small-Cap Virtual Investor Conference. The event is scheduled for Thursday, March 19, 2025, at 11:30 a.m. Eastern Time.

news.headline: Biodexa reports positive Phase 3 meeting with FDA for eRapa in FAP, a rare genetic condition.
Serstech receives 2.1 MSEK order from Kaiser in Singapore for SERS consumables, to be delivered and invoiced in Q2 2025.
news.summary: Serstech, a company specializing in chemical identification solutions, received a 2.1 MSEK order from partner Kaiser in Singapore. The order comprises SERS consumables and is set for delivery and invoicing in Q2 2025. For further information, interested parties can contact CEO Stefan Sandor or Chairman of the Board Thomas Pileby. Serstech serves customers globally in safety and security sectors, with applications in customs, police, security agencies, and first responders. The company is listed on Nasdaq First North Growth Market and produces all solutions in Sweden. More details can be found on their website.

news.headline: Inozyme Pharma announces strategic focus on ENPP1 Deficiency Pivotal Program and reports full-year 2024 financial results.
news.summary: Inozyme Pharma has announced its full year 2024 financial results and also disclosed a strategic focus on the pivotal program for ENPP1 deficiency. The company's financial report for the year highlighted a revenue increase of (insert number) compared to the previous year. The decision to prioritize the ENPP1 deficiency program comes as part of the company's strategic planning for the future. This move underscores the company's commitment to advancing treatments for this specific medical condition. This strategic shift aligns with the company's goal to address unmet medical needs and further establish its position in the pharmaceutical industry.

news.headline: Amentum initiates secondary offering of 19,464,174 shares of common stock (NYSE: AMTM), no proceeds received.
news.summary: Amentum Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: AMTM) has initiated a secondary underwritten public offering, putting up 19,464,174 shares of its common stock for sale. The company itself will not be selling any shares and will not reap any benefits from this offering or a debt-for-equity exchange. A subsidiary of Jacobs Solutions Inc. (NYSE: J) is involved in this process.

news.headline: Report highlights growth of no-alcohol beverage market in US by 2025. Includes gut health products, cannabis drinks, hydration brands. From alcohol alternatives to plant-based waters and more. - ResearchAndMarkets.com
news.summary: A report titled "Next Wave of No-Alcohol Beverages in the U.S., 2025" by Beverage Marketing is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. This report explores the innovation revolution in the beverage industry, covering a wide range of categories such as alcohol alternatives, mixers, cannabis-infused drinks, gut health products, premium waters, children's beverages, plant-based waters, probiotics, and yerba mate guayusa. The report delves into various innovative segments and brands in the market. For more information, interested individuals can access the report through ResearchAndMarkets.com.

news.headline: San Diego philanthropist David Malcolm launches Spring 2025 scholarship; applications accepted Mar 1 - May 31.
news.summary: Applications for the David Malcolm Scholarship for Spring 2025 are currently being accepted from March 1 to May 31. The scholarship, based in San Diego, announced the opening on March 10, 2025. Exceptional students with notable achievements are encouraged to apply for this opportunity.

news.headline: TIAA expands to offer lifetime income annuities to all Americans, over 55M without retirement plan at work.
news.summary: Over 55 million American workers currently do not have the option of a retirement plan through their employer. TIAA is making a significant change by expanding its mission to provide all Americans with the opportunity to receive pension-like guaranteed retirement payments for the rest of their lives. By choosing to annuitize a portion of their savings with TIAA Traditional, individuals can potentially receive between 33% and 43% more in retirement benefits.

news.headline: CISOs Connect report on cybersecurity debt uncovers vulnerabilities. Authored by 10 CISOs, explores root causes and mitigation.
news.summary: A recent report, compiled by a group of 10 Chief Information Security Officers (CISOs), delves into the origins, hidden effects, and strategies to reduce the impact of a pressing issue. Released in New York on March 10, 2025, the report offers insights into addressing this challenge. CISOs Connect, a specialized association committed to enhancing the careers and knowledge of CISOs, is behind this initiative.

news.headline: Grandville Public Schools & Amazon to host VEX Robotics Tournament of Champions on March 15, 2025.320+ participants expected.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, a major event is set to take place at the Grandville Robotics Competition Center. On Saturday, March 15, partners from Grandville, Hudsonville, and Jenison will convene for the 2025 Michigan VEX IQ Tournament of Champions. The tournament will bring together skilled participants and enthusiasts in the field of robotics for a day full of competitions and showcases. Stay tuned for more updates on this exciting event.

The James of Irvine begins construction on an eight-story luxury senior living community in Orange County targeting a 2027 opening.

This eight-story community is set to open in the summer of 2027. It promises modern amenities, holistic care, and an active lifestyle with walkable surroundings for its residents. This marks a significant development in the senior living industry, aiming to provide upscale accommodation and services for the elderly population in the region.

Gemini considers IPO with Goldman Sachs/Citigroup. Kraken plans IPO for Q1 2026. El Salvador reopens vet hospital funded by Bitcoin profits. Brazil's post office explores blockchain/AI integration. US rejects taxing crypto transactions. Ex-FTX CEO in solitary for unauthorized interview.
news.summary: Gemini, a crypto exchange founded by the Winklevoss twins, is considering an IPO this year, with Goldman Sachs and Citigroup involved. Meanwhile, Kraken is also planning an IPO in early 2026. The SEC recently closed its investigation into Gemini and dropped its lawsuit against Kraken, who denied all allegations. El Salvador's Chivo Pets vet hospital, funded through Bitcoin profits, was briefly closed due to complaints but has since reopened. El Salvador also purchased six more Bitcoin, bringing its total holdings to 6,111 BTC. Brazil's postal service is exploring the use of blockchain and AI. David Sacks rejected taxing crypto transactions for a US Bitcoin reserve, while former FTX CEO SBF was reportedly put in solitary confinement for an unauthorized interview.

news.headline: Hackers utilize crypto mixers, crosschain bridges to mask stolen assets. North Korean Lazarus Group laundered $1.46 billion post Bybit hack via tools like THORChain. Investigative methods aim to uncover fraud in crosschain transactions amidst regulatory challenges.
news.summary: Coin mixers, also known as tumblers, are utilized by hackers to obscure the origin of cryptocurrency transactions. Hackers send stolen funds to mixers, which then blend them with coins from other users to conceal identities. Notably, North Korea's Lazarus Group laundered $1.46 billion in crypto using mixers and crosschain bridges. A multi-step laundering process involving splitting funds, swapping tokens, using DeFi platforms, and OTC networks was employed. Investigators employ crosschain tracking tools to combat such fraud. Regulatory challenges persist around mixers, with FATF flagging their usage for illicit activities. Balancing privacy and security in the crypto ecosystem remains crucial for the future.

news.headline: UK PM Starmer's Spokesperson: Starmer will host a virtual meeting of world leaders to discuss Ukraine on March 15th.
Software firm Strategy still up $7.8B in Bitcoin despite $80K dip. Holds 499,096 BTC at $66,423 avg, spent $33.1B. Others see losses.
news.summary: Software intelligence firm Strategy has made a profit of $7.8 billion on its Bitcoin holdings despite the recent drop in the cryptocurrency's value. Bitcoin saw its largest weekly decline, going from $93,379 on March 3 to $80,610 on March 10, a 13.6% decrease. Strategy purchased 499,096 BTC at an average price of $66,423, spending $33.1 billion in total, now valued at $41.2 billion — a 24% gain. Their strategy of dollar-cost averaging is highlighted for buying at different times. On the other hand, Semler Scientific and Metaplanet are facing losses on their BTC holdings. Semler holds 3,192 BTC purchased at an average of $87,850, experiencing a 6.25% loss. Metaplanet holds 2,888 BTC bought at $83,049, down by over $2 million. Strategy spent $23 billion on Bitcoin since November 2024 but is now facing an unrealized loss of over $3 billion due to the recent price drop.

news.headline: Former Liberty Energy CEO and U.S. Energy Secretary predicts US shale industry can produce oil despite low prices, like $50/barrel. Position primed for higher production with innovation, despite possible market disruptions.
news.summary: U.S. Energy Secretary, Chris Wright, believes that the U.S. shale sector can increase oil production even if prices drop to $50 per barrel. Wright, previously the CEO of Liberty Energy, is optimistic about the industry's ability to innovate and improve efficiency, leading to higher production levels at reduced prices. He mentioned that market dynamics would drive prices down, with new supply encouraging companies to innovate and lower prices, while consumers and suppliers would consider various options. The U.S. shale sector is well-equipped to meet the demand for increased drilling, as expressed by Donald Trump's "drill, baby, drill" mantra. However, Wright foresees a potential industry disruption akin to the 2014 price war between OPEC and shale producers.

(NYSE: A) recently shared that its PD-L1 IHC 28-8 pharmDx kit has secured approvals for two new companion diagnostic indications under EU IVDR, broadening treatment accessibility to early-stage non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) and previously untreated advanced melanoma patients. With these additions, the total indications introduced in Europe for PD-L1 IHC 28-8 pharmDx now stand at nine. The kit is exclusively authorized for.

news.summary: A recent report indicates a surge in COVID-19 cases worldwide, with over 10 million confirmed cases and 500,000 deaths. The United States accounts for a significant portion of these numbers, with over 2.5 million cases and 125,000 deaths. Countries like Brazil, Russia, and India are also experiencing rapid increases in infections. The World Health Organization continues to stress the importance of preventive measures such as wearing masks and practicing social distancing to curb the spread of the virus. Governments are implementing various measures to control the situation, including lockdowns and increased testing. The global economic impact of the pandemic is significant, with unemployment rates rising and businesses struggling to stay afloat. Experts warn that the situation may worsen if proper measures are not taken to mitigate the spread of the virus.

Poor ergonomics in manufacturing cause almost 400,000 injuries annually, costing businesses billions.

These disorders are frequently a result of inadequate ergonomics and pose a considerable challenge for the industry. MSDs have led to nearly 400,000 injuries per year, resulting in substantial financial burdens for employers.

news.headline: Xonar Technology Inc. appoints Michael Brletich as COO amid advances in AI security screening systems.
news.summary: Xonar Technology, a company based in St. Petersburg, Florida, recently appointed Michael Brletich as its Chief Operating Officer. The company is making waves in the industry by introducing state-of-the-art security screening systems that are powered by artificial intelligence. This move comes amidst a growing demand for advanced security measures in various sectors. Michael Brletich's appointment as COO is seen as a strategic decision to drive the company's growth further.

news.headline: Global Green HVAC market set to reach US$165.1 billion by 2035, growing at 7.0% CAGR. Europe's heat pump sales dropped 47% in 2024 due to reduced subsidies and lower gas prices. Top players include Carrier, Daikin, Lennox International, Mitsubishi Electric, among others, focusing on eco-friendly innovation.
news.summary: The Global Green HVAC industry, valued at US$78.8 billion in 2024, is projected to reach US$165.1 billion by 2035, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.0%. Environmental regulations and increased adoption of eco-friendly climate control systems are driving this growth. In 2024, the European heat pump market saw a substantial drop, with sales falling by 47% to 765,000 units sold across 13 countries. This decline was linked to reduced government subsidies and lower gas prices, affecting consumers' transition to renewable energy heating systems. Despite challenges, demand for energy-efficient HVAC solutions remains strong due to climate change concerns and regulations promoting green technologies. Leading companies in the industry like Carrier, Daikin, Mitsubishi Electric, and others are driving innovation with eco-friendly advancements to reshape HVAC systems and align with sustainability goals and regulatory standards.

news.headline: SGX to launch Bitcoin futures in second half of 2025, joining major groups like Osaka Dojima; crypto trend on the rise.
news.summary: Bitcoin futures are becoming an increasingly popular trend in the crypto space, with significant international entities like SGX and Japan’s Osaka Dojima aiming to launch Bitcoin futures by 2025. This development highlights the growing interest in the potential of futures trading in the cryptocurrency market.

news.headline: Will Trump gamble on a recession? President champions protectionist trade policies, despite short-term economic risks.
news.summary: The president maintains confidence in his protectionist trade strategies, stating they will benefit the country in the future. He acknowledges the possibility of facing temporary economic challenges but remains optimistic about the long-term results.

news.headline: FICO offers FICO Score Mortgage Simulator through Xactus for lenders, helping drive smarter decisions for more loan options.
news.summary: An analytics software leader, FICO (NYSE: FICO), has revealed that their FICO® Score Mortgage Simulator is now accessible to lenders through Xactus, a top fintech company in verification solutions for mortgages and the largest credit reseller. With this partnership, mortgage professionals can utilize the simulator to make informed decisions, potentially offering more loan choices and better interest rates for clients. This move aims to enhance the mortgage process and customer outcomes.

news.headline: Chris Bilotto appointed as SVC's Managing Trustee, Pres. & CEO on March 10, 2025. He's an EVP of The RMR Group.
news.summary: Newton, Massachusetts - Service Properties Trust has appointed Chris Bilotto as the new Managing Trustee, President, and CEO, effective March 10, 2025. Bilotto currently serves as the Executive Vice President of The RMR Group and is responsible for the acquisition platform, asset management of all hotel and senior living properties, and property development/redevelopment across the United States. This change comes as part of SVC's strategic leadership transition plan, signaling a new chapter for the company.

news.headline: Seven Hills Realty Trust appoints Matthew Brown as CFO and Treasurer, effective March 10, 2025. Brown, a Senior VP of RMR Group, has been with RMR since 2007.
news.summary: Newton, MA - Seven Hills Realty Trust (Nasdaq: SEVN) has named Matthew Brown as the new Chief Financial Officer and Treasurer, starting March 10, 2025. Brown, currently a Senior Vice President at The RMR Group (Nasdaq: RMR), will bring his expertise in accounting, finance, and tax as he transitions to his new role. Having been with RMR since 2007, Brown has held multiple leadership positions in accounting and finance, focusing on reporting and compliance.

news.headline: BTCS partners with ETHGas to optimize Ethereum blockspace, investing $250,000 to achieve faster transaction confirmations compared to Solana.
news.summary: BTCS Inc. has partnered with ETHGas to expand the market of fee-based products on Ethereum's network. The partnership aims to bring ultra-low-latency scaling to Ethereum, enabling transaction confirmations 100 times faster than Solana. BTCS has invested $250,000 in ETHGas and will serve as a Priority Builder. This move aligns with BTCS's strategy to drive revenue growth, improve margins, and enhance efficiency in Ethereum transactions. Founded in 2014, BTCS was the first U.S. public company in Bitcoin mining and has transitioned its focus to Ethereum in recent years. This partnership marks a significant step in their blockchain infrastructure and digital asset innovation journey.

news.headline: Verus Mortgage Capital remains top non-agency RMBS issuer in 2024, with $6.5 billion financed in 12 deals, totaling $31.4 billion since inception.
news.summary: Verus Mortgage Capital (VMC), a prominent correspondent investor focusing on residential non-QM and investor rental programs, solidified its standing as a top issuer of non-agency mortgage-backed securities in the previous year. VMC concentrates on expanded credit/non-QM and investor rental loan programs and successfully funded 12 deals amounting to over $6.5 billion. Over its history, VMC has financed about $31.4 billion across 65 rated securitization transactions, further establishing its position in the market.

news.headline: Essential Properties Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE: EPRT) declares $0.295 per share quarterly dividend for Q1 2025, $1.18 annualized dividend.
news.summary: Essential Properties Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE: EPRT) based in Princeton, N.J., has disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.295 for each share of common stock for Q1 2025. This equates to an annualized dividend of $1.18 per common stock share. The dividend will be distributed on April 11, 2025, to shareholders on record as of March 31, 2025. Essential Properties Realty Trust, Inc. is recognized for its real estate investment portfolio.

news.headline: Westlake Royal Building introduces black frame option to Legacy Collection window line. Responds to demand for darker options.
news.summary: Westlake Royal Building Products has recently launched a black frame option for its Legacy Collection window line under Westlake Royal Window Solutions. The introduction of this new color variant is in response to the increasing desire for darker window frame choices. This trend has been fueled by the popularity of Modern Farmhouse aesthetics, with black frames remaining a sought-after option even as trends evolve. Steve B mentioned the persistent demand for black window frames and other dark shades, emphasizing that such options have remained popular despite changes in home styling preferences. Westlake Royal, a subsidiary of Westlake (NYSE: WLK), aims to cater to this demand through the addition of the black frame option to its product lineup.

news.headline: Rigel Pharmaceuticals appoints Dr. Mark W. Frohlich to Board of Directors; brings 25+ years of experience.

Dr. Frohlich, a medical oncologist with over 25 years of experience in research and development, joins the board. The company is listed on Nasdaq under the symbol RIGL.

news.headline: Algebrik AI partners with Jack Henry™ to integrate Loan Origination System with Symitar®, targeting finance industry.
news.summary: In New York, Algebrik AI Inc., a company based in New York City and incorporated in Delaware, has unveiled the first cloud-native, AI-driven Loan Origination System (LOS). The company announced its participation in the Jack Henry™ Vendor Integration Program, offering access to technical resources for integrating its Loan Origination Platform with Symitar®. The program aims to enhance connectivity between systems.

news.headline: PEAK3 launches crowdfunding campaign for industrial ATSC 3.0 M.2 receiver "PEAKcast3" for edge computing.
news.summary: An Arizona-based company PEAK3 has introduced a crowdfunding campaign for their new industrial-grade ATSC 3.0 M.2 receiver called "PEAKcast3." The device is designed to incorporate broadcast technology into edge computing systems to provide real-time data delivery at scale, particularly for industries. The receiver is compact in size, suitable for industrial use, and capable of withstanding harsh environments. The campaign aims to raise funds for the production of this innovative technology.

news.headline: CloudLinux CEO to speak at CloudFest 2025 in Germany, unveiling new Max Web Server, 4 p.m. (CET) on March 19 in Berlin.
news.summary: CloudLinux, a prominent player in enhancing Linux server security and stability, revealed that CEO Igor Seletskiy will be a keynote speaker at CloudFest 2025, the biggest global cloud event happening from March 17-20 in Europa-Park, Germany. Seletskiy's keynote will be at 4 p.m. (CET) on March 19 in the .COM Ballroom (Ballsaal Berlin), where he will introduce a new MAx Web Server. This server inclusion is free of charge.
